subcodes.first_line: O thou who art guided by the light of the Kingdom! I am apprised of thy faith, thy certitude and thy steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المهتدی بنور الملکوت قد اطلعت بایمانک و ایقانک و ثبوتک
subcodes.subjects: @many are called but few are chosen, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
